notes: Small FPS difference against Windows, specially when you face a big number of ennemy. But except that the game run fine.
title: Siege of Centauri

notes: Tower models or textures do not show, and FPS is horrendous. But it is playable (the towers shoot, they're just invisible). If you set the GFX quality settings to lowest in game, the tower _models_ will show up, but they're entirely black and untextured.
title: Siege of Centauri

notes: When I used PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1, the game at least loads up the main menu, but then freezes when trying to start a game. I can't be bothered to test other workarounds, because the devs of the game are lazy cunts.
title: Siege of Centauri

notes:
